title: Power Window Master Switch Input Inspection

crossRefs.label: Disconnect the power window master switch 24P coupler.

blocks.text: Power Window Master Switch Input Inspection
Perform the following checks before performing input inspections

items.text: Inspect No.C5 (10A), No.C17 (15A), No.C18 (15A), No.C19 (15A), No.C20 (10A), No.C30 (15A), No.C39 (20A) and fuses in the fuse box for blown fuses and connections.

blocks.text: 1. Disconnect the power window master switch 24P coupler. 2. Perform input checks and if all is normal and there is an error in the system, step 3 Proceed to 3. Reconnect the power window master switch 24P coupler The following is a list of the most common problems with the 4. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace power window master switch The following is a list of the most common problems with the If the power window master switch has been replaced, Reset and learn power windows. The following is a list of the most common problems with the
